title: My Random Mod - Boykisser Mod
description: This is a mod that adds Boykisser shit to the game. A new biome, new ore, new structure, and more.
body:
This is a joke mod that I made in like, Feburary. Didn't want it to be very popular I guess, now we're here. Enjoy it, I guess.

# DESCRIPTION
This mod can make you feel like a boykisser, with a new biome & dimension to explore, new ore that's "_slighty_" better then iron, and a bunch more. Not really that proud of the mod right now but hey, it's being updated.
